# Test error handling for missing config file

# Try to generate VEX without config file - should fail
! exec vens generate --llm=mock --sbom-serial-number=urn:uuid:3e671687-395b-41f5-a30f-a58921a69b79 report.json output.cdx.json
stderr 'config-file is required'
